data_now_in_macro_trend.hpi_history: 133 monthly London+UK HPI entries (Jan 2015–Jan 2026), Land Registry official
data_now_in_macro_trend.area_prices: Monthly borough prices for Camden(NW3), Islington(N1), Brent(NW6), Westminster(W2), Kensington&Chelsea(SW3/SW10)

data_not_available.bedroom_type: 1-bed, 2-bed, 3-bed, detached price indices NOT in these files. Would require Land Registry price-paid-data bulk CSV with D/T/S/F/O property type codes. This is a ~5GB file requiring postcode-to-area mapping.
data_not_available.reason: ONS publishes HPI by property type (D=Detached, T=Terraced, S=Semi-detached, F=Flat, O=Other) but only at national/regional level. London borough × property type is not published by ONS.

recommendation: For bedroom type analysis: download Land Registry price-paid-data CSV (gov.uk), filter by London postcodes (NW, N, W, SW), aggregate by property type code (F=flat, T=terraced, S=semi, D=detached). This is a large data operation requiring user approval.
